title: Nassella airoides
intro: Nassella airoides, also known as Sideoats Grama, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Nassella airoides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Sideoats Grama include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe respiratory tract issues and promote relaxation.
